title: Majili
subTitle: Poorna, an aspiring cricketer, falls into a deep depression after being abandoned by his lover, Anshu. Despite this, he is forced to marry his neighbour Sravani, who secretly has feelings for him.

title: Warning 2
subTitle: The situation intensifies when Geja, who failed to assassinate Pamma, ends up in the same prison as him, determined to complete the task.

title: MLA Ka Power
subTitle: A simple man falls for a rich landlord's daughter and in order to prove his love and marry her, he must become an MLA and succeed.

title: Gangers
subTitle: Saravanan, an undercover officer disguised as a PT master, confronts merciless criminals, unearths their fraud and recruits school personnel to dismantle their operation.

title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 3
subTitle: Ruhaan, a fake ghost-chaser, takes a job at a spooky castle and finds out about a bad plan by tricky priests. His trip becomes a funny but scary ride with lots of surprises and frights.

title: Men in Black 3
subTitle: Agent J of the Men in Black goes back in time to prevent the assassination of his partner, Agent K, at the hands of an alien criminal named Boris the Animal.

title: Good Bad & Ugly
subTitle: A formidable crime lord strives for tranquility, abandoning his brutal history. Despite lingering shadows, he confronts his past with unwavering resolve.

title: The Mummy Returns
subTitle: An evil high priest wants a bracelet that Alex, an archaeologist couple's son, possesses.

title: Bagheera
subTitle: A psycho killer creates an application to kill women who get a complaint about cheating on their man. However, his life changes when he meets a psychology student.

title: Bagheera
subTitle: A psycho killer creates an application to kill women who get a complaint about cheating on their man. However, his life changes when he meets a psychology student.

title: Sarpatta The Warrior
subTitle: A young man living in the segregated Madras of the 1970s is presented with the opportunity to revive his boxing career and his clan. He decides to take it but soon faces challenges in his path.

title: Biskut
subTitle: A young man, who works at his father's biscuit factory, meets a woman in a nursing home. However, he soon discovers her narrated tales are strangely coming true in reality.

title: Ek Tsunami: Jwalamukhi
subTitle: A man wakes up from a coma and becomes confused when everyone calls him Godse. Soon, he finds himself in the middle of a conspiracy started by a corrupt chief minister.

title: Rama Rao on Duty
subTitle: A courageous and honest police officer investigates the case of the missing husband of his ex-girlfriend, which leads him to bust a scam pertaining to the illegal smuggling of red sandalwood.

title: House Mates
subTitle: Newlyweds Karthik and Anu move into an old apartment where strange occurrences unsettle their lives, leading them to uncover a paranormal mystery involving another family nearby.

title: Baahubali
subTitle: Raised by a tribe, a young man sets out to help his lady love rescue an enslaved princess of a kingdom that is ruled by a tyrannical king. In doing so, he soon discovers his true identity.

title: Lakshya
subTitle: Karan, an aimless young man, joins the Indian Army on a whim but backs out when he finds a soldier's life to be difficult. When this creates conflict with his girlfriend, he rejoins to make her proud.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 2
subTitle: Rocky successfully rises as the leader and saviour of the people of the Kolar Gold Fields. But, in his goal to fulfil his mother's wishes, Rocky must tackle Adheera, Inayat Khalil and Ramika Sen.

title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
subTitle: After learning that his father was brutally killed by Bhallaladeva, Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat him and release his mother from the former's captivity.

title: Thandel
subTitle: Raju, an Indian fisherman, is arrested after accidentally straying into foreign waters and faces a fraught journey home to his beloved Satya.

title: Connect
subTitle: Susan, the mother of Anna, a teenage girl, seeks virtual help from a pastor to perform an exorcism through an online video call.

title: Taana
subTitle: A determined young man dreams of becoming a police officer, but his nervous voice disorder holds him back. Subsequently, he decides to overcome his fear to prove his worth and fight for his dream.

subTitle: Maariyappan, a gangster, is confronted by Gangadhar Beeja, a rival. While he strives to defeat him, he attempts to cope with his son's questionable behaviour.

subTitle: Hiranyakashyap, a demon, challenges Vishnu, proclaiming himself a god. However, his son Prahlad remains devoted to Vishnu, who appears as Narsimha to defeat the demon.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
subTitle: Rocky, a young man, seeks power and wealth in order to fulfil a promise to his dying mother. His quest takes him to Mumbai, where he gets involved with the notorious gold mafia.
